vulnerabilities.description: Sensitive information (API Key) is being loaded from environment variables without appropriate security checks or validations.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement checks to ensure that environment variables are correctly set and possibly use a secure vault for managing sensitive credentials.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential for user input to be improperly sanitized, leading to risks of injection attacks when creating cron schedules.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-provided data, especially the `recurrence` parameter.

vulnerabilities.description: Error handling is not robust; failures in sending notifications or logging them may expose internal system details.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement comprehensive error handling that masks system details from the user and logs errors without exposing sensitive information.

vulnerabilities.description: Inadequate authorization checks; there is no verification of user permissions when accessing or modifying tasks.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Ensure strong authorization checks for all API calls, verifying that the user has adequate permissions for the action being taken.
